description_long: This object is a compact, double-barreled shotgun with a short barrel and a wooden grip. The barrels are arranged side-by-side, and the metal receiver and barrels are finished in matte black. The grip and fore-end are made of a reddish-brown wood, smoothly contoured for ergonomic handling. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a single trigger, with a simple, utilitarian design. The overall form is robust and minimal, with no visible stock, making it suitable for close-quarters use. The muzzle end reveals two parallel bores, confirming the side-by-side configuration.
description: A compact, side-by-side double-barreled shotgun with a wooden grip and matte black barrels, lacking a full stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, the wooden grip, and the matte black double barrels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the width of the wooden grip and the alignment of the barrels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the trigger guard and grip curvature.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the two parallel barrel openings and the compact, stockless design.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a simple, smooth contour and no finger grooves
